creator: david@landgren.net
text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of sysutils/p5-BSD-Sysctl,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/105193 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

The patch is designed to prevent a build on perl 5.005_xx. I'll put it 
on my TODO to make sure that the module can indeed be installed on 5.005 
(because there is no intrinsic reason in the code as to why not), in 
which case the restriction may be lifted in a future version.

But in the meantime...

I approve the patch.

> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/105193
> 

Thanks,
David Landgren

-- 
Much of the propaganda that passes for news in our own society is given 
to immobilising and pacifying people and diverting them from the idea 
that they can confront power. -- John Pilger
